2604.05931.title: Saliency-Guided Representation with Consistency Policy Learning for Visual Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning
2604.05931.paper_summary: Zero-shot unsupervised reinforcement learning (URL) offers a promising direction for building generalist agents capable of generalizing to unseen tasks without additional supervision. Among existing approaches, successor representations (SR) have emerged as a prominent paradigm due to their effectiveness in structured, low-dimensional settings. However, SR methods struggle to scale to high-dimensional visual environments. Through empirical analysis, we identify two key limitations of SR in visual URL: (1) SR objectives often lead to suboptimal representations that attend to dynamics-irrelevant regions, resulting in inaccurate successor measures and degraded task generalization; and (2) these flawed representations hinder SR policies from modeling multi-modal skill-conditioned action distributions and ensuring skill controllability. To address these limitations, we propose Saliency-Guided Representation with Consistency Policy Learning (SRCP), a novel framework that improves zero-shot generalization of SR methods in visual URL. SRCP decouples representation learning from successor training by introducing a saliency-guided dynamics task to capture dynamics-relevant representations, thereby improving successor measure and task generalization. Moreover, it integrates a fast-sampling consistency policy with URL-specific classifier-free guidance and tailored training objectives to improve skill-conditioned policy modeling and controllability. Extensive experiments on 16 tasks across 4 datasets from the ExORL benchmark demonstrate that SRCP achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot generalization in visual URL and is compatible with various SR methods.
2604.05931.paper_summary_zh: 零-shot 無監督強化學習 (URL) 提供了一個有前景的方向，用於構建能夠在沒有額外監督的情況下對未見任務進行泛化的通用代理。在現有的方法中，後繼表示 (SR) 已經成為一種突出的範式，因為它們在結構化的低維環境中表現出色。然而，SR 方法在高維視覺環境中難以擴展。通過實證分析，我們確定了 SR 在視覺 URL 中的兩個主要限制：(1) SR 目標通常導致次優表示，這些表示關注於與動態無關的區域，從而導致不準確的後繼度量和降低的任務泛化；(2) 這些有缺陷的表示阻礙了 SR 策略對多模態技能條件動作分佈的建模，並確保技能可控性。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了具有一致性政策學習的顯著性引導表示 (SRCP)，這是一個新穎的框架，可以改善 SR 方法在視覺 URL 中的零-shot 泛化。SRCP 通過引入一個顯著性引導的動態任務來捕捉與動態相關的表示，從而將表示學習與後繼訓練解耦，改善後繼度量和任務泛化。此外，它整合了一個快速抽樣的一致性政策，並結合了 URL 特定的無分類器引導和量身定制的訓練目標，以改善技能條件政策的建模和可控性。在 ExORL 基準的 4 個數據集上進行的 16 項任務的廣泛實驗表明，SRCP 在視覺 URL 中實現了最先進的零-shot 泛化，並且與各種 SR 方法兼容。
2604.05931.author: Jingbo Sun et.al.
2604.05931.authors: Jingbo Sun, Qichao Zhang, Songjun Tu, Xing Fang, Yupeng Zheng, Haoran Li, Ke Chen, Dongbin Zhao
